news.headline: North America plastic fencing market to hit $4.1 billion by 2035, growing at 6.4% CAGR from $2.1 billion in 2024. Eco-friendly demand rises. Key players include Trex, CertainTeed, and Duramax. Trend towards sustainable, durable fencing solutions driven by innovations and consumer shift.
news.summary: The North America plastic fencing market is valued at $2.1 billion in 2024 and is expected to grow at a CAGR of 6.4% to reach $4.1 billion by 2035. The demand for plastic fencing is rising due to its durability, cost-effectiveness, and low maintenance requirements. Key players in the market include ActiveYards, Bufftech, and Trex Company. Recent developments include new composite fencing materials made from recycled materials and UV-resistant vinyl options. The industry is focused on environmentally friendly solutions and technological advancements to meet consumer needs. Analysts predict continued growth driven by the demand for sustainable and innovative fencing solutions.

news.headline: Futures of US stocks dip as gold reaches a new high.
BASports.com dominates, wins 48 MLB contests, hailed best handicapper in 2025 season.
news.summary: Renowned handicapper Dr. Bob Akmens has achieved an impressive 48 first-place finishes in national MLB Baseball handicapping contests. Based in WAUCHULA, Fla., the exciting 2025 MLB Baseball season has begun, with BASports.com recognized as the top baseball handicapper by professionals in the field. They have secured the coveted #1 spot...

news.headline: Aqua Data Studio v25.0 released, offering AI-powered Natural Language Querying with OpenAI integration for data analysis.
news.summary: In a recent announcement made on February 20, 2025, Aqua Data Studio introduced version 25.0, featuring integrated connectivity with OpenAI. This new release revolutionizes user interactions with data through Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology. Notably, the update includes Native Language Querying (NLQ) powered by AI, enabling users to...

news.headline: Vitalik Buterin calls out crypto trend towards gambling, pointing out Ethereum criticism for not embracing casinos on blockchain.
news.summary: Vitalik Buterin recently addressed criticisms online, stating that Ethereum has been portrayed negatively due to its lack of support for casinos on the blockchain.

news.headline: Medical Properties Trust, Inc. to host Q4 2024 financial results call on February 27, 2025 at 11:00am Eastern Time.
news.summary: BIRMINGHAM, Ala.--Medical Properties Trust, Inc. (NYSE: MPW) has scheduled a conference call and webcast for Thursday, February 27, 2025, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review the company's financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024. The fourth quarter 2024 financial results will be disclosed in a press release prior to the market opening on the same day. For those interested, the conference call can be accessed using the following dial-in numbers: 877-883-0383 (U.S.) and 412-902-6506 (International).

news.headline: Golden Gate Global sees positive change in I-829 processing times by USCIS, with improvement over the last 8 months.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 20, 2025, Golden Gate Global (GGG), a prominent EB-5 regional center, revealed a significant enhancement in the processing time of I-829 petitions by U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS). In the span of the last eight months, GGG has observed a commendable progress in the adjudication timeline, marking a substantial milestone for the company.

news.headline: meQuilibrium launches "Ask meQ for Managers" AI tool to prevent burnout, boost performance. Aims to provide crucial support for managers, reducing risk of impact on entire organization.
news.summary: "Ask meQ for Managers" program is designed to help managers avoid burnout by offering real-time assistance in resolving key leadership issues. The initiative, introduced in Boston on Feb. 20, 2025, by meQuilibrium (meQ), aims to address critical challenges before they escalate throughout the organization. Recent research revealed a significant triple-digit increase in the number of managers experiencing heightened stress levels, emphasizing the urgency for programs like "Ask meQ for Managers" to provide timely support.

news.headline: Free music lessons in 1,200+ locations to celebrate 11th Teach Music Week, happening March 17-23, 2025.
news.summary: In Philadelphia, the 11th Annual Teach Music Week is set to take place from Monday, March 17th to Sunday, March 23rd. Keep Music Alive shared this exciting news, calling on musicians, music schools, music stores, and other music-related entities to participate in this week-long event.

news.headline: Study by Snap, Tinuiti, and Alter Agents finds AR is revolutionizing word-of-mouth marketing. Published in February 2025.
news.summary: Research conducted in Los Angeles on February 20, 2025, analyzed the digital transformation of consumer decision-making and the impact of word-of-mouth marketing, which is a highly trusted factor influencing consumer choices. The study highlighted the growing influence of augmented reality (AR) and social media content in shaping consumer behavior. This shift underscores the changing landscape of marketing strategies, as traditional methods evolve to adapt to the preferences of modern consumers. The research emphasized the significant role AR and social media play in shaping consumer perceptions, contributing to a shift in how individuals make purchasing decisions. This transformation reflects the increasing importance of digital platforms in influencing consumer behavior, indicating a notable trend in the marketing industry.

news.headline: Josh Taylor appointed as Head of Squash Academy Teams at The St. James Performance Academy in Springfield, VA as of Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: A renowned coach, Josh Taylor, will be taking on an expanded role as the Director of The St. James Performance Academy Squash in Springfield, Virginia. The academy made this announcement on February 20, 2025. This move aims to bring Taylor's elite training experience to the academy, enhancing the squash program. This development signifies a significant step towards elevating the status of the academy and attracting more squash enthusiasts.

news.headline: 2025 Cybersecurity Staff Compensation Benchmark Report reveals large gaps, limited growth, hiring, retention challenges.
news.summary: A recent report uncovered significant challenges in the cybersecurity talent market, including wide compensation gaps and limited career advancement opportunities. The study, conducted by IANS Research and Artico Search, also highlighted difficulties in hiring and retaining professionals due to the return-to-office mandates. Released on February 20, 2025, the report identified these issues as major obstacles in the industry. The findings indicate that organizations are struggling to attract and retain skilled cybersecurity professionals due to these factors.

news.headline: SKYX to supply smart technologies to 3 luxury projects for Forte Developments.
news.summary: SKYX has been chosen to provide its cutting-edge smart plug and play technologies to three future ultra-high-end luxury projects by Forte Developments. With this new collaboration, SKYX is set to equip a total of three upcoming high-end luxury projects with its advanced solutions.

news.headline: NextGen Healthcare selected by Elite DNA Behavioral Health to improve patient care. Elite DNA has 30+ clinics in Florida.
news.summary: NextGen Healthcare, a prominent healthcare technology provider, has been selected by Elite DNA Behavioral Health based in Florida to supply a flexible technology platform. Elite DNA, known for its virtual and in-person psychiatry and psychotherapy services for adults, operates over 30 clinics in Florida with plans to launch multiple new sites this year. The collaboration aims to support Elite DNA's expansion and improve patient care, as NextGen Healthcare focuses on enhancing the organization's technology infrastructure.

news.headline: Ryan McDowell appointed as VP of Sales at CyberlinkASP to boost growth and partnerships. Dallas, Feb. 20, 2025.
news.summary: CyberlinkASP welcomes a skilled Channel Sales Leader to boost growth and enhance the partner network. The appointment was made on February 20, 2025, in Dallas. CyberlinkASP is recognized as a reliable Advanced Solutions Provider offering cloud and managed IT services to small and mid-size enterprises.

news.headline: Morelink and MaxLinear partner to launch 5G Repeater platform in Taiwan; Morelink Technology Corporation reveals the product powered by MaxLinear MxL1600 RF transceivers.
news.summary: A company based in Taipei, Taiwan, has recently introduced a new 5G Repeater platform. Morelink Technology Corporation revealed the innovative product, which utilizes MaxLinear MxL1600 RF transceivers for enhanced performance. This development marks a significant advancement in the telecommunications industry, offering improved connectivity and efficiency.

news.headline: Green Science Alliance in Tokyo displays plant-based products to combat environmental issues; aims to address plastic pollution.
news.summary: In Kawanishi-City, Japan, on February 20, 2025, various environmental issues are escalating globally as a result of the rapid growth of the human population. These problems include climate change, deforestation, species extinction, water and food shortages, among others. One major concern is the significant increase in plastic pollution, which is causing detrimental effects on ecosystems and wildlife populations. The urgent need for sustainable solutions is highlighted by the growing environmental challenges faced due to human activities.

news.headline: BostonGene wins "Cancer Immunology Solution of the Year" award from BioTech Breakthrough with AI-driven solutions.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, BostonGene, a prominent provider of AI-based molecular and immune profiling solutions, was revealed as the recipient of the prestigious "Cancer Immunology Solution of the Year" award in the fourth edition of the BioTech Breakthrough Awards program. This recognition, granted by BioTech Breakthrough, a respected market intelligence entity honoring exceptional life sciences and biotechnology firms, showcases cutting-edge innovations on a worldwide scale. BostonGene's immune system profiling technology was acknowledged for its ability to forecast trends in cancer immunology.

news.headline: New horror-thriller "A Soldier's Descent" delves into PTSD and war effects, promises groundbreaking exploration. Written by Phil Herman, coming soon. Characters: 237
news.summary: In Pinehurst, North Carolina, a groundbreaking psychological horror and action film titled "A Soldier's Descent" is set to be released soon. The movie, written by renowned indie horror figure Phil Herman, delves into the profound impacts of war and PTSD in a way that has never been seen before. Scheduled for release on February 20, 2025, this film promises to offer a unique and chilling viewing experience for audiences.

news.headline: Vitalik Buterin criticizes blockchain 'casinos,' disagrees with Solana's approach to meme coins, emphasizes Ethereum's sustainability over short-lived projects.
news.summary: Vitalik Buterin, one of the co-founders of Ethereum, expressed disappointment in the criticism that Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is facing for not embracing "blockchain casinos." Buterin responded to this criticism on Tako, stating that Ethereum is deemed as not respecting casinos on the blockchain. His remarks are seen as indirectly criticizing other blockchains, particularly Solana (CRYPTO: SOL), known for its proliferation of meme coins. This criticism may also be directed at the SEC's view of the ETH market. Ethereum has historically positioned itself as a versatile platform; however, the abundance of quickly-launched meme coins on Solana has led to concerns about the ethical impact and long-term viability of such projects. Buterin's disappointment stems from the lack of acknowledgment for Ethereum's approach.

news.headline: Oxford Biomedica's tech aids BI's Phase I/II trial of gene therapy for cystic fibrosis.
news.summary: Oxford Biomedica (OXB) will provide lentiviral vector manufacturing support for Boehringer Ingelheim's Phase I/II trial of a groundbreaking gene therapy for cystic fibrosis. This marks the initiation of the trial and showcases the use of OXB's advanced technology in the development of this first-of-its-kind treatment. The lentiviral vectors produced by OXB are crucial for delivering the gene therapy to patients. This collaboration highlights the importance of innovative manufacturing processes in advancing medical research.

news.headline: Scientists from PNU and KIMM collaborate to study gas flow dynamics in Plasma Arc Cutting for various manufacturing applications.
news.summary: In Busan, South Korea, as of February 20, 2025, Plasma Arc Cutting (PAC) is a commonly utilized thermal cutting method in various industries, including shipbuilding, aerospace, fabrication, nuclear plant decommissioning, construction, and automotive. The technique's popularity stems from its efficiency and precision, with a significant number of applications benefitting from its implementation.

news.headline: DistillerSR integrates with RightFind Enterprise, allows purchase of articles from CCC's database of 165M+ articles.
news.summary: DistillerSR customers now have access to search and buy content directly from CCC's bibliographic database of over 165 million articles. The announcement was made in San Diego on Feb. 20, 2025. DistillerSR Inc. is the leading provider of literature review automation software.

news.headline: Peabody Engineering introduces full line of PCS Containment Enclosures for 360° protection of employees and environment. #CORONA #CA #PRNewswire
news.summary: In Corona, California on February 20, 2025, Peabody Engineering, a prominent manufacturer and distributor in the United States known for tanks, telecommunication disguising equipment, and other plastic goods, launches their new Pump Spill Containment (PCS) Enclosures line. The line includes the PCS-1, PCS-2.1, PCS-3, among others, extending their product range in spill containment solutions.

news.headline: Incheon National University develops new wireless charging tech with dynamic frequency adaptation to enhance efficiency.
news.summary: A cutting-edge auto-adjusting rectifier has been created for wireless power in INCHEON, South Korea. This innovative novel resonant technology aims to boost efficiency through dynamic frequency adaptation. Reports indicate that wireless charging systems often face constraints in efficiency due to power loss resulting from frequency alterations. This new rectifier could potentially address this issue by optimizing frequency settings during operation. The development holds promise for improving overall efficiency in wireless power applications.

news.headline: National Museum of Mexican Art will honor Rick & Deann Bayless and Carlos R. Cardenas at 2025 Gala de Arte on May 2, 2025 in Chicago.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, the National Museum of Mexican Art Board of Trustees revealed the honorees for the upcoming 2025 Gala de Arte. This event, with the theme "Orgullo Mexicano" (Mexican Pride), is scheduled to take place on Friday, May 2, 2025, at the Hyatt Regency Chicago.

news.headline: ACR Poker announces revamped tournament schedule for faster play & more action, with launch date set for Feb. 21st.
news.summary: In San Jose, Costa Rica, on February 20, 2025, ACR Poker revealed plans for a comprehensive overhaul of its tournament schedule, scheduled to debut on Friday, February 21. The revamped schedule, crafted based on player input, will feature a higher number of tournaments with increased guarantees, aiming to enhance the overall gaming experience for participants.

news.headline: Zamnesia holds Art for Asheville Design Competition, offering NC artists chance to appear on cannabis seed packaging, $27.90 for 3 seeds.
news.summary: In Weaverville, North Carolina, Zamnesia, the top online Smartshop in Europe with a U.S. location in western NC, is excited to launch the Art for Asheville design contest. Local artists in North Carolina can submit their designs for a shot to be featured on the packaging of the Blue (Ridge) Haze Automatic, a special cannabis seed. Each package of Blue (Ridge) Haze Automatic is priced at $27.90 for 3 seeds, symbolizing the date of the disaster, Sept. 27, 2024. This unique opportunity is part of Zamne's new initiative to support local talent and create a limited-time product offering.

news.headline: Iktos receives €2.5M EIC Accelerator grant to advance AI and robotics platform for drug discovery.
news.summary: In Paris on February 20, 2025, Iktos, a top player in AI-powered drug discovery, received a significant €2.5 million grant from the European Innovation Council (EIC) Accelerator. The grant aims to further develop the company’s AI and robotics synthesis automation technology. This funding opportunity holds great potential for...

news.headline: New Leica Summilux-M 50 f/1.4 lens offers unrivalled bokeh, expanding the Classic Line. Tradition spanning 150+ years.
news.summary: Teaneck, New Jersey - On February 20, 2025, a latest addition to the renowned Leica Classic Line, the M classic, has been introduced, featuring a lens that offers exceptional bokeh, further enhancing its iconic status. Leica, a brand with a prestigious history of over 150 years, is known for producing high-quality lenses that are handcrafted to perfection. Through the years, Leica has crafted numerous masterpieces, cementing its reputation as a leader in the industry.

news.headline: Holley Performance Brands to engage over 1 million enthusiasts at 2025 events, showcasing products.
news.summary: Holley Performance Brands, a top player in automotive aftermarket performance solutions, has revealed the calendar for its much-awaited 2025 flagship event season. Known for its extensive brand and product range, Holley's experiential marketing events draw in car enthusiasts nationwide to witness the power and performance offered by the automotive aftermarket sector. Following a record-breaking event season last year, Holley aims to continue its growth and engagement with the audience.

news.headline: 70% planning exit, 87% have concerns, 68% feel undervalued at work per Blackhawk Network study in Pleasanton, Calif.
news.summary: Blackhawk Network (BHN) from Pleasanton, California, a global leader in branded payments, released new research on employee engagement, revealing alarming numbers on workplace satisfaction. The Employee Engagement study found that 87% of surveyed employees expressed concerns about their current job, while 68% reported feeling undervalued at work. This indicates a significant gap between employees and their employers, signaling the need for improved engagement strategies.

news.headline: CSG will present at Citizens JMP’s Technology Conference in San Francisco on March 3, 2025, featuring John Rea.
news.summary: In Denver, CSG® revealed plans to participate in Citizens JMP’s Technology Conference at The Ritz Carlton in San Francisco, CA. Scheduled for March 3, 2025, at 3:00PM PST, the presentation will be led by John Rea, CSG’s Senior Vice President & Head of Finance, Investor Relations, Treasury, Insurance, and ESG Reporting. He will offer a comprehensive company overview during the event. Those interested can access the webcast of the presentation through CSG's website.

news.headline: Schrödinger (Nasdaq: SDGR) granted RSUs for 5,445 shares to 5 new employees on Feb 17, 2025 as inducements.
news.summary: In New York, Schrödinger, Inc. (Nasdaq: SDGR) announced today that on February 17, 2025, it awarded 5,445 shares of the company's common stock in the form of restricted stock units (RSUs) to five new employees. These grants were issued under the 2021 Inducement Equity Incentive Plan. The compensation committee of the board of directors approved the grants following a delegation by the board of directors. The awards were provided as a significant incentive for the new hires.

news.headline: VSee Health signs $560K contract for virtual command center with major oncology network in the U.S., boosting digital health growth.
news.summary: A contract worth $560,000 has been signed by VSee Health in San Jose, California, with a major oncology network in the United States. This agreement aims to establish a virtual command center to enhance patient flow management within the network.

news.headline: CrowdStrike to present at Morgan Stanley conference on March 6, 2025 at 7:45am PST, with live webcast. (Nasdaq: CRWD)
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWD) shared news of their upcoming presentation at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference. The event will be held in San Francisco on Thursday, March 6, 2025, with the presentation scheduled for 7:45 a.m. PST. Those interested can watch the webcast live and access the archived version on CrowdStrike's investor relations website at ir.crowdstrike.com. CrowdStrike, a leading global cybersecurity company, operates under the Nasdaq symbol CRWD.

news.headline: U.S. housing market value grew by $2.5 trillion in 2024, reaching $49.7 trillion, with a 5.2% increase year over year.
news.summary: In Seattle, the total value of U.S. homes, listed under NASDAQ: RDFN, increased by $2.5 trillion in 2024, totaling $49.7 trillion, as reported by Redfin. This marks a 5.2% growth in the housing market value, the slowest increase since 2019 and the second-slowest since 2011. The current availability of homes for sale is higher compared to previous years, providing buyers with more options.

news.headline: Corpay Cross-Border becomes official FX payments supplier for FIG, world governing body for gymnastics.
news.summary: In Toronto, Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), a prominent player in corporate payments globally, has disclosed a significant development. Their Cross-Border division has inked a deal with Federation Internationale de Gymnastique (FIG), which serves as the governing body for gymnastics worldwide and is endorsed by the International Olympic Committee (IOC). This partnership appoints Corpay as the Official Foreign Exchange Payments Supplier for FIG. The collaboration will enable FIG to leverage Corpay Cross Border’s advanced solutions for their financial transactions.

news.headline: ScanSource to present at Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, Florida on March 5, 2025, at 8:40 a.m. CFO to speak. Webcast available.
news.summary: In Greenville, South Carolina, ScanSource, Inc. (NASDAQ: SCSC), a prominent hybrid distributor facilitating the connection of devices to the cloud, disclosed intentions of participating at the Raymond James Institutional Investors Conference in Orlando, Florida. On Wednesday, March 5, 2025, at 8:40 a.m. ET, Steve Jones, the Chief Financial Officer, will present at the event. Interested individuals can access the session through a live webcast, and a replay will be accessible for 30 days after the initial presentation.

news.headline: Cizzle Brands expands in Western Canada with CWENCH Hydration™ now available in all Calgary Co-op and Freson Bros. stores.
news.summary: In Toronto, Cizzle Brands Corporation (Cboe Canada: CZZL) (OTC: CZZLF) (Frankfurt: 8YF) has shared that all four flavors of its CWENCH Hydration™ ready-to-drink (RTD) product are now on shelves at Calgary Co-op and Freson Bros. in Alberta. These major regional grocery chains in Canada offer customers access to the popular RTD beverages. Moreover, Freson Bros. is stocking 10-count packs of CWENCH Hydration™.

news.headline: Add On Systems releases Fleet Safety Suite, integrates fleet risk management into one solution, improving efficiency.
news.summary: Add On Systems has introduced Fleet Safety Suite in Oklahoma City, combining fleet risk management into one efficient solution. The platform eliminates scattered data silos, improving fleet efficiency and profitability. Fleet Safety Suite integrates key fleet management features into a single platform for real-time decision-making and proactive risk management. This innovative solution aims to address industry challenges and enhance operational performance.

news.headline: Imagine Pharma selects Designs for Health as exclusive distributor for new Progenalen Pro Peptide dietary supplement.
news.summary: Imagine Pharma is set to launch a new dietary supplement named Progenalen® Pro Peptide, derived from their proprietary polypeptide, IMG-1®. The biotech company is based in Pittsburgh and aims to capitalize on commercialization opportunities associated with their innovative product. The launch is scheduled for February 20, 2025. The supplement is anticipated to attract consumers seeking wellness solutions, tapping into a market segment that values novel formulations.

news.headline: Nova (Nasdaq: NVMI) will host virtual Investor Day on March 13, 2025 for semiconductor manufacturing solutions.
news.summary: Rehovot, Israel - On February 20, 2025, Nova, traded on Nasdaq as NVMI, a prominent innovator and provider of metrology solutions for semiconductor manufacturing, disclosed plans to hold a virtual Investor Day on March 13, 2025. This event aims to showcase Nova's advancements in advanced process control to interested stakeholders.

news.headline: Economy starts 2025 strong with GDP, labor market,  inflation data; Mortgage rates predicted to end at 6.6%.
news.summary: It is forecasted that mortgage rates will reach 6.6 percent by the end of 2025, with expectations of volatility. Reports from Feb. 20, 2025 indicate that incoming data on gross domestic product (GDP), labor market conditions, and inflation suggest a robust start to the year. The economy is experiencing strong momentum based on these factors.

news.headline: Scope Technologies (CSE: SCPE) unveils AI-enhanced Quantum Preparedness Assessment (QPA) integrated with risk management framework.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 20, 2025, Scope Technologies Corp. shared a significant update regarding its Quantum Preparedness Assessment (QPA) product. The company, trading as SCPE on the Canadian Securities Exchange, SCPCF on the OTCQB market, and VN8 on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange, unveiled the successful integration of the QPA with an industry-standard platform. This development marks a significant milestone for Scope Technologies as they continue to enhance their product offerings to better serve their clients.

news.headline: Celebrate Love Your Pet Day with Katherine Heigl's Badlands Ranch Superfood Complete for healthy, happy dogs.
news.summary: On February 20, 2025, in Park City, Utah, Badlands Ranch introduces Superfood Complete, air-dried formulas packed with essential nutrients for dogs to thrive. Celebrating Love Your Pet Day, actress and animal advocate Katherine Heigl discloses her pet care tips and endorses these formulas.

news.headline: Neuberger Berman RE Securities Income Fund announces preliminary results of rights offering; offering ran from January 23 to February 19, 2025.
news.summary: In New York on February 20, 2025, Neuberger Berman Real Estate Securities Income Fund Inc. (NYSE American: NRO) shared the initial outcomes of its transferable rights offering (the "Offer") that started on January 23, 2025, and concluded on February 19.

news.headline: Adrianne Shapira joins Crown Labs Board of Directors, to serve as Audit Committee Chair with 20+ years of industry experience.
news.summary: In Johnson City, Tennessee on February 20, 2025, Crown Laboratories, Inc. welcomed Adrianne Shapira to its Board of Directors, appointing her as the Audit Committee Chair. With a remarkable background spanning over two decades in the consumer and retail sectors, Ms. Shapira brings valuable expertise to the role.

news.headline: Vonage research shows AI impacting CX, with growing demand and adoption; Global Customer Engagement Report data reveals opportunities for enhancement.
news.summary: According to the latest Global Customer Engagement Report released on February 20, 2025, in Holmdel, New Jersey, the increasing demand for AI-driven features is creating new prospects for improving customer experience (CX). The report highlights a rise in the adoption of AI technologies, indicating a growing trend in leveraging AI capabilities to enhance CX. Vonage, a prominent player in cloud communications, is at the forefront of this digital transformation. The data from the report underscores the potential for businesses to address common customer challenges by integrating AI solutions into their operations. This signals a significant shift in how companies are approaching customer engagement strategies globally.

news.headline: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. prices $2.6M public offering of 1,304,348 shares at $2.00 each on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Intelligent Bio Solutions Inc. (Nasdaq: INBS) revealed today the pricing of its underwritten public offering of 1,304,348 common stock shares at $2.00 per share. The total gross proceeds are estimated to be around $2.6 million, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and offering expenses. The Company specializes in providing intelligent, rapid, and non-invasive testing solutions in the medical technology sector.
